title: ATS Job Postings Scraper — Input
description: Scrape job postings from company career boards on Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, or Workable. Provide company slugs or careers-page URLs.

companies.title: Companies (slugs or careers URLs)
companies.description: Company career boards to scrape. Accepts full URLs (https://boards.greenhouse.io/stripe, https://jobs.lever.co/spotify, https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/openai, https://apply.workable.com/blueground) or bare slugs (platform auto-detected). Max 500.

titleFilter.title: Title filter
titleFilter.description: Only include jobs whose title contains this text (case-insensitive), e.g. "engineer".

locationFilter.title: Location filter
locationFilter.description: Only include jobs whose location contains this text (case-insensitive), e.g. "Toronto" or "Remote".

remoteOnly.title: Remote only
remoteOnly.description: Only include jobs flagged as remote.

includeDescription.title: Include full description
includeDescription.description: Include the plain-text job description (up to 5000 chars) in each result. Disable for smaller datasets.
